name: A Methodology for Auditable Trustworthiness Levels in AI Lifecycle Governance

description: arXiv:2607.16130v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: AI governance increasingly requires judgments about whether an AI system remains adequately trustworthy over time, whether observed changes are tolerable, and how such judgments should be documented in a transparent and contestable way. Yet existing work on AI trustworthiness remains either too high-level to support lifecycle monitoring and reas...
author: Andrea Ferrario
